message:
perf: migrate database, lab, messaging, net, transport, and util to parking_lot

database/sqlite: Migrate SqliteConnection from std Mutex, removing
.map_err(|_| SqliteError::LockPoisoned) error paths in execute(),
execute_batch(), query(), close(), and is_open(). Simplify Debug impl
from .lock().map(|g| ..).unwrap_or(..) to direct .lock().conn.is_some().
Collapse if-let-Ok pattern in SqliteTransaction::Drop rollback to direct
.lock().

lab/runtime: Migrate LabRuntime scheduler Mutex from std to parking_lot,
removing ~15 .lock().unwrap() calls throughout step(), run_until_quiescent(),
cancel_task(), and test helpers. Replace if-let-Ok(write) patterns with
direct .write() in cancel_waker setup and cancel_ack consumption.
Replace .and_then(|inner| inner.read().ok()) with .map(|inner| inner.read())
for priority lookups. Migrate test imports to parking_lot.

messaging/kafka: Migrate delivery channel (DeliverySender/DeliveryReceiver)
from std Mutex, removing 4 .expect("delivery lock poisoned") calls.

messaging/nats: Migrate NatsClient state (subscriptions, server_info)
from std Mutex, removing ~8 .lock().unwrap() calls across subscribe,
dispatch_message, close, and Subscription::Drop.

net/tcp/virtual_tcp: Migrate VirtualTcpStream read/write halves and
VirtualTcpListener state from std Mutex, removing 7 .expect("lock
poisoned"/"channel lock poisoned") calls. Replace map_or_else poison-bail
patterns in Drop with block-scoped direct .lock() calls.

net/unix/split: Migrate UnixStreamInner state and OwnedReadHalf
registration from std Mutex, removing 2 .expect("lock poisoned") calls.

transport/mock: Migrate SimQueue state from std Mutex, removing ~15
.expect("sim queue lock poisoned") calls across SimSymbolSink,
SimSymbolStream, and their SymbolSink/SymbolStream trait impls.

util/entropy: Migrate DetEntropy from std Mutex, removing 3
.expect("det entropy lock poisoned") calls in fill_bytes(), next_u64(),
and fork().

util/resource: Migrate ResourceTracker from std Mutex, removing 6
.expect("lock poisoned") calls in usage(), limits(), add_observer(),
pressure(), can_acquire(), try_acquire(), and ResourceGuard::Drop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
